arts.ttl: 'Dream start!'- Bromley score after eight minutes against Newcastle
arts.sum: Watch League Two Bromley take a shock lead as Cameron Congreve scores within eight minutes against Newcastle United in the FA Cup at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Newcastle fan favourite linked with a surprise move to Everton
arts.sum: Everton are reportedly targeting Newcastle United’s midfield stalwart Sean Longstaff in the January transfer window. Newcastle may be forced into selling players to comply with Profit and Sustainability Rules, putting several high-profile stars at risk of departure. arts.ttl: €27m heading to La Liga side as Wolves agreement comes into effect
arts.sum: Last summer, Celta Vigo agreed the departure of Jorgen Strand Larsen to Wolves – it was an initial loan with a buy clause included. The Norwegian had been on fine form during his time in Galicia, although it is now confirmed that he will not be returning. As per ED, the buy clause in the […] The post €27m heading to La Liga side as Wolves agreement comes into effect appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Newcastle owe a Champions League debt to Wolves but must not repay them now
arts.sum: As United battle for the points required to return to Europe's most elite table having dramatically risen from 12th to fifth to renew hope it is ironic that Wolves should be the latest opposition because they are currently celebrating the 70th anniversary of an epic achievement that brought about the birth of the European Cup as it was initially called. On a chilly December evening in 1954 under the Molineux floodlights which were something of a novelty at the time and in front of an expectant crowd of 55,000 the English champions claimed a monumental 3-2 victory over Honved, one of the greatest club teams of the era.

arts.ttl: Wolves sign Reims defender Agbadou for £16.6m
arts.sum: Wolves complete the £16.6m signing of defender Emmanuel Agbadou from Reims on a four-and-a-half year deal.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho's Fenerbahce launch bid for Newcastle defender - as club chief reveals negotiations have taken place with the Magpies
arts.sum: The Turkish outfit - who are managed by former Chelsea , Manchester United and Tottenham boss Jose Mourinho - want to bolster their backline before the transfer window slams shut.

arts.ttl: Report: Newcastle centre-back linked with move, club official confirms talks
arts.sum: Newcastle United defender Lloyd Kelly is being linked with a move away from St James’ Park despite transferring to the northeast only in the summer. Kelly arrived from Bournemouth in June last year on a free transfer after failing to agree on a new deal at the Vitality Stadium.
